ai_logs.input: Given the main goal: "financially stable and live happily", generate exactly 8 key pillars or sub-goals that comprehensively cover all aspects needed to achieve this goal. Return as JSON object with key "pillars" containing an array of exactly 8 strings. Example: {"pillars": ["pillar1", "pillar2", "pillar3", "pillar4", "pillar5", "pillar6", "pillar7", "pillar8"]}

Given the main goal: "financially stable and live happily", generate exactly 8 key pillars or sub-goals that comprehensively cover all aspects needed to achieve this goal. Return as JSON object with key "pillars" containing an array of exactly 8 strings. Example: {"pillars": ["pillar1", "pillar2", "pillar3", "pillar4", "pillar5", "pillar6", "pillar7", "pillar8"]}
ai_logs.output: {"pillars": ["Manage Debt and Expenses", "Increase Income and Savings", "Invest Wisely and Diversify", "Build Multiple Income Streams", "Develop Financial Literacy and Planning", "Maintain Good Physical and Mental Health", "Foster Strong Personal Relationships", "Create a Fulfilling Career and Work-Life Balance"]}

ai_logs.input: Given the sub-goal: "Develop Financial Literacy and Planning" (part of main goal: "financially stable and live happily"), generate exactly 8 specific, actionable steps or tasks to achieve this sub-goal. Return as JSON object with key "actions" containing an array of exactly 8 strings. Example: {"actions": ["action1", "action2", "action3", "action4", "action5", "action6", "action7", "action8"]}
ai_logs.output: {"actions": ["Create a budget that accounts for all income and expenses", "Research and understand different types of savings accounts and investments", "Set up automatic transfers for savings and bill payments", "Develop a long-term investment strategy", "Learn to track and manage debt effectively", "Understand and apply the 50/30/20 rule for expense allocation", "Read books or take online courses on personal finance and investing", "Schedule regular financial reviews to assess progress and adjust plans as needed"]}

ai_logs.input: Given the main goal: "Jadi presiden", generate exactly 8 key pillars or sub-goals that comprehensively cover all aspects needed to achieve this goal. Return as JSON object with key "pillars" containing an array of exactly 8 strings. Example: {"pillars": ["pillar1", "pillar2", "pillar3", "pillar4", "pillar5", "pillar6", "pillar7", "pillar8"]}
ai_logs.output: {"pillars": ["Membangun Karir Politik", "Mengembangkan Jaringan dan Relasi", "Meningkatkan Kapasitas dan Kompetensi", "Membentuk Citra Publik yang Positif", "Mengembangkan Visi dan Misi yang Jelas", "Mengumpulkan Sumber Daya dan Pendanaan", "Membangun Tim dan Organisasi yang Kuat", "Mengembangkan Strategi Kampanye yang Efektif"]}

ai_logs.input: Given the sub-goal: "Mengembangkan Visi dan Misi yang Jelas" (part of main goal: "Jadi presiden"), generate exactly 8 specific, actionable steps or tasks to achieve this sub-goal. Return as JSON object with key "actions" containing an array of exactly 8 strings. Example: {"actions": ["action1", "action2", "action3", "action4", "action5", "action6", "action7", "action8"]}
ai_logs.output: {"actions": ["Mengidentifikasi Nilai Inti", "Menganalisis Kekuatan dan Kelemahan", "Menentukan Tujuan Strategis", "Mengembangkan Pernyataan Misi", "Mengembangkan Pernyataan Visi", "Mengkonsultasikan dengan Stakeholder", "Mengintegrasikan Visi dan Misi ke dalam Rencana Strategis", "Mengkomunikasikan Visi dan Misi kepada Publik"]}

ai_logs.input: Convert the following goal into a SMART goal (Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound): "Mengembangkan Jaringan dan Relasi". Return as JSON object with key "smart" containing the SMART goal string, and key "breakdown" as an object with keys S, M, A, R, T each containing a short explanation. Example: {"smart": "...", "breakdown": {"S": "...", "M": "...", "A": "...", "R": "...", "T": "..."}}
ai_logs.output: {"smart": "Mengembangkan jaringan dan relasi dengan menambah 10 kontak baru setiap bulan dalam 6 bulan ke depan untuk meningkatkan kesempatan kerja sama dan pendanaan", "breakdown": {"S": "Mengembangkan jaringan dan relasi", "M": "Menambah 10 kontak baru setiap bulan", "A": "Menghadiri 2 acara jaringan setiap bulan dan mengirimkan 5 email pendekatan setiap minggu", "R": "Meningkatkan kesempatan kerja sama dan pendanaan", "T": "Dalam 6 bulan ke depan"}}
